milestones.title: Initial idea planning
milestones.summary: The original fan-game concept, resort framing, and early scope boundaries were defined.

milestones.title: Title screen demo
milestones.summary: A first playable-facing presentation test proved the tone and project identity.

milestones.title: MVP: moving Pokémon around
milestones.summary: Core movement and Pokémon handling experiments established the first gameplay loop.

milestones.title: Create public web page
milestones.summary: The project gained a static public home for research, compatibility, and operations tracking.

milestones.title: 3D map and render pipeline started
milestones.summary: Current focus: rebuild the island, prepare submodels, and connect the 3D map to public research data.

milestones.title: Implement 3D map into the web page
milestones.summary: Replace the temporary island viewport with the real GLB model and attach stable POI markers.

milestones.title: Add POI evidence system
milestones.summary: Connect frame crops, map crops, diagrams, needed assets, and linked features to each point of interest.

milestones.title: Add character and sprite showcase
milestones.summary: Show planned resort staff and visitors with animated GIF/WebP previews and animation requirements.

milestones.title: Playable resort walkthrough
milestones.summary: Ship a navigable internal walkthrough that proves scale, pathing, transport, and activity zones.

milestones.title: Compatibility system stabilization
milestones.summary: Turn untested ontology routes into documented test cases with bugs and route outcomes.

milestones.title: Public demo build
milestones.summary: Prepare a careful public-facing demo when the legal, technical, and scope conditions are ready.
